    136.Lord Enver Gortash: Rise. I, Lord Enver Gortash, Chosen of Bane, command you. note: Gortash raises his Netherstone into the air to command the brain, like he's done a million times before.!GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeatedWYR_KillDirectorGortash_State_AgreedToMeetInUndercity

      • +
        161.No Speaker: (no line text)note: Gortash's stone drifts out of his hand. He reacts with surprise as floats in front of the player, joing its counterpart Netherstones collected from the defeated Chosen. The three stones combine in mid-air, and land in the player's hand.!GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeatedWYR_KillDirectorGortash_State_AgreedToMeetInUndercity

          45.Speaker 0: -interruption-- --anomaly---
          --found---- -focused--
          -END-- -NOW-          note: [Morphic Pool: Netherbrain emerges] Bubbles on the surface of the morphic pool. The Netherbrain rises. Player reacts with horror, and pockets the combined Netherstone.END_MorphicPool_Event_ConfrontationStarted

              55.No Speaker: (no line text)note: The world fades into the black winds shown in GOB_Orpheus_VoiceofAbsolute. The player small and insignificant in the full presence of the brain and it's direct attention.

                  81.Speaker 2: You think you know why you are here.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8ce46641-6b9d-506d-42c2-a8246e02b282Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: h1e7e1629g9453g4708ga7cdg20cc2ae0e8a0Text UUID: 5737116f-78d9-4071-a436-941eb1a6d184Group ID: 64d82b71-afe7-1d5f-2c8c-17a52aca5561Group Index: 2
                  • +
                    127.Speaker 0: You think that by enslaving me with the Netherstones, you will bring your Father's scourge upon the world.ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalAcceptedDark Urge

                      123.Speaker 2: You are wrong.note: A psionic shockwave bursts from the Netherbrain, and the blackwinds whipping around the player kick up.

                              141.The Emperor: It's messing with your mind. Don't listen to it. Use the stones. note: The Astral Prism drifts to the center of the party, and emits it's psionic shield

                                  Node Type: Visual StateUUID: ad54efd9-e5d1-5be4-3f58-c061264e7a60Group ID: d991f557-097a-8ff8-c825-58b349e51cc4Group Index: 2
                                  • +
                                    142.No Speaker: (no line text)note: The player (and possibly Gortash) arrive in a vast liminal space created by the Karsus' Compulsion, it's the horrifying manifestation of the Netherbrain's mind. The Astral Prisim floats next to the player and they give it a nod, acknowleging that they know their work has just begun.

                                        91.Success

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: RollResultUUID: 97513a9f-9ec8-fff2-75c3-d8df53d65daeSuccess: True
                                        • +
                                          100.No Speaker: (no line text)note: The player holds the stone in their left hand and thrusts their right forward for the somatic componant. A spectral form of a massive chained haproon buzzes by the player toward the face forehead of the Netherbrain.

                                                                73.Speaker 0: You placed the Crown upon me in the depths of Moonrise Towers, and there I was born.Dark UrgeORI_DarkUrge_Quest_CrownedNetherbrain

                                                                    134.Lord Enver Gortash: You are delusional - the Crown is how we controlled you! note: Gortash steps in front of the player, pulling into his grasp. The waves it, unfocused, in the direction of the Netherbrain as a doddered priest might dangle a crucifix before and elder god--ineffectually.!GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeatedWYR_KillDirectorGortash_State_AgreedToMeetInUndercity

                                                                        154.Speaker 2: I respected Bhaal's child once, but not you, Gortash. I allowed you to control me as long as it suited my purpose.Dark Urge

                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                          69.Speaker 2: Who do you think planted the knowledge of Orpheus' power, and the fear of what it could do?

                                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 75b0829d-0b85-05ea-c63f-e56d58eabf9bSpeaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: hd6999a5ag31e1g44bcg99a7ged4496b003edText UUID: cdd1c4ba-7b2f-4359-81fe-729f1d5154f9Group ID: 9f63d217-a376-2499-2a78-7966707fcf64Group Index: 1
                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                            52.Speaker 2: When the Chosen sent my thralls to retrieve the Prism - who do you think let the 'Emperor' slip its leash, knowing it would be the one to bring you to me?

                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 616dd86b-847d-f626-5d12-d88b31eb0ff6Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: hd5f41d9fgd4dag425agb072g934680988a1cText UUID: 4a662d94-8df1-4858-97c7-d402b78137f1Group ID: 9f63d217-a376-2499-2a78-7966707fcf64Group Index: 2
                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                              89.The Emperor: We were part of its plan...

                                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 955d758b-a674-8256-2f06-bb57552595daSpeaker: 3 (The Emperor)Text Handle: h57206726ga238g4539g8158gdf2acfc92a12Text UUID: a09587fa-913e-4967-a692-4861980adb71Group ID: 9f63d217-a376-2499-2a78-7966707fcf64Group Index: 3
                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                12.Speaker 2: I only needed one Netherstone loosened from the Chosen's grasp to guarantee my freedom.

                                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1a2e1eef-ea49-312d-f68b-1f71b2a604a8Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: he2446bc9g407cg41e5gb596g17beaeb078bfText UUID: fd13b8d9-960f-4fb5-826e-63a9c0ce7b4eGroup ID: 9f63d217-a376-2499-2a78-7966707fcf64Group Index: 4
                                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                                  26.Speaker 2: You brought all three back to me. In doing so, you have liberated me.

                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2ca6523c-4a9f-9bf3-2244-f6ab2147285eSpeaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: hf7e50b93g57d9g4db0ga8f0g4a82f232860eText UUID: 04d9d177-6d13-48de-b97a-b8edee10afbcGroup ID: 9f63d217-a376-2499-2a78-7966707fcf64Group Index: 5
                                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                                    120.Speaker 2: This was your role - and it is complete.

                                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bc08a5cd-c00a-6d42-179e-df732a9c4139Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: h89e07c8ag67afg4f73gbdeag8c864bea43e0Text UUID: 3159ca43-8dc6-417b-ac16-66c945307356Group ID: 9f63d217-a376-2499-2a78-7966707fcf64Group Index: 6
                                                                                                                    • +

                                                                                                                                    148.No Speaker: (no line text)note: The player closes their eyes to focus, holding the Netherstone to their head.                                                                                                                                       84.No Speaker: (no line text)note: The brain shakes its promethean head, and all chains dissapate. The player has failed.

                                                                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                                                                      Node Type: TagCinematicUUID: 913bf682-4cc3-cc85-b8e6-a90450288d58Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)Show Once: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex

                                                                                                                                        135.No Speaker: (no line text)note: The brain lets out a psionic boom that knocks the player and their party to the ground.

                                                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                                                          44.No Speaker: (no line text)note: The Astral Prism expands into a portal appears and the emperor levitates through. Emperor faces down the brain.

                                                                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                                                                          Node Type: TagCinematicUUID: 580aad2e-6233-ef0d-2ef2-4a4ab5e483f6Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)Show Once: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
                                                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                                                            107.The Emperor: This is not over. note: The Emperor psionically flings the player through the portal into safety, then goes into the portal and closes it.

                                                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a9dfb8b7-3a4d-20d1-c4e9-a522af05e2c6Speaker: 3 (The Emperor)Text Handle: h3f4f477dg2e8ag413fg91bfg20ef0ba702fbText UUID: 47f3ef6f-ec4f-49e1-a0c1-a7c3d0777269Group ID: d4e81289-052d-1665-bd7e-edd280514135Group Index: 2
                                                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                                                              139.No Speaker: (no line text)note: The Netherbrain speaks as the Astral Prism itself retreats through the Karsus' Portal

                                                                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                                                                              Node Type: TagCinematicUUID: d841b75f-21bb-4b8b-642e-ad86fb7a1922Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)Unmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
                                                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                                                16.(no line text)

                                                                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                                                                Node Type: Visual StateUUID: 203eedd5-734d-b117-fbbc-9253acdc24edGroup ID: d4e81289-052d-1665-bd7e-edd280514135Group Index: 4
                                                                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                                                                  163.No Speaker: (no line text)note: The (faceless) brain blasts upwards through the ceiling. Cut to Upper City, the evolved Netherbrain is levitating above the High Hall. Nautiloids arrive, flanking the brain, and a pulse of psychic energy washes over the city.

                                                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagCinematicUUID: fd2e0198-a4a9-0cdd-5a06-3a0e78302a47Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)Show Once: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
                                                                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                                                                    158.No Speaker: (no line text)note: [Real world: Ceremorphosis, baby!] Cut to: Baldur's Gate streets. The infected begin to transform. Chaos, screaming, panic.

                                                                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                                                                    Node Type: TagCinematicUUID: f26a87d2-fbf4-406d-f7cf-dd48d84ec444Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)Show Once: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
                                                                                                                                                    • •
                                                                                                                                                      145.No Speaker: (no line text)note: [Fade to black] Camera pans back up to nautiloids arriving above city. Fade to black. Feels like we're about to get a game over scene.END_MorphicPool_DEBUG_LeaveMindArena

                                                                                                                          36.Speaker 13: NO! Minsc of Rashemen has never bowed to a brain, and we will not begin today. AGAIN!ORI_Inclusion_PickedAtRandomMinsc

                                                                                    104.The Emperor: Resist! You cannot let it do the same to you!

                                                                        128.Speaker 2: The delusions are all yours, Gortash. You controlled me only for as long as I allowed you to.

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9811d4b2-369b-8a37-75e1-85bdf2cdf3cfSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)

                                                                      59.Speaker 2: You brought the Crown to me, Bhaalspawn, thinking the army I amassed with it would become yours.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                        25.Speaker 2: Your plan was devious, your cruelty unparalleled. I would have followed it, were your mind not destroyed by your sister.

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 28911558-8ca9-94b3-fedc-46099a27017dSpeaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: he243ad59gb087g4e7fg9600gc00eb6daf944Text UUID: 880cd810-098a-40aa-91ec-35cd1c7240deGroup ID: 6d17e78f-8535-a808-85d6-b52a996ff3b4Group Index: 1
                                                                        • +
                                                                          117.Speaker 2: But with you gone, the three pitiful Chosen fought like children in your wake. I gave them power to harm one another with, while I crafted my design.

                                                                          Metadata

                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b745a493-18ef-6115-82d0-fd39d6ef3e11Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: hfb6f11d7gb36ag4fc3gb35dgaefecb27751fText UUID: 7605374e-bd60-4bb1-9002-3e47e003bc3cGroup ID: 6d17e78f-8535-a808-85d6-b52a996ff3b4Group Index: 2
                                                                          • +
                                                                            90.Speaker 2: I used the Chosen, while they thought they used me. But the orders are now mine to give.

                                                                            Metadata

                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9617df7b-b747-ad70-7a2b-e696b4ade8f6Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: hb5740105g2eeag4c5cga66eg2412f7871321Text UUID: 59545e99-cb75-43d9-ae83-c6b4cc5b68d7Group ID: 6d17e78f-8535-a808-85d6-b52a996ff3b4Group Index: 3
                                                                            • +
                                                                              28.The Emperor: I won't allow it. Again! Dominate it!

                                                                              Metadata

                                                                    137.Speaker 0: (no line text)

                                                                    • +
                                                                      11.Speaker 2: I needed the Crown to build an army. I needed the Chosen to bring it to me.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      • +
                                                                        98.Speaker 2: They would not have surrendered it freely, so I gave them what they wanted - power.

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9b22872a-2b0c-73fc-c339-bbf4fcd7d6f7Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: h1a1c3ce5gfcaeg4d5cgb66bgdb0e762bb63bText UUID: 0b2bb572-8fe7-43f9-8853-cebcc17db8e8Group ID: 16c15ba6-5390-6c93-76bc-9b3fb59620e8Group Index: 1
                                                                        • +
                                                                          99.Speaker 2: Just enough that they would play their part in my design.

                                                                          Metadata

                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9bd5b058-0397-d48c-fe67-67789b89ba43Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: h3556ff6eg308dg49a3g97a2g067f73ac1d9bText UUID: 9149c1ca-f1d9-4619-bacb-deee2ec702bbGroup ID: 16c15ba6-5390-6c93-76bc-9b3fb59620e8Group Index: 2
                                                                          • +
                                                                            147.Speaker 2: Their part has ended. The next orders will be mine.

                                                                            Metadata

                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: df9aed6c-c023-faf7-b52e-bac3594c662bSpeaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: h594b11b4g5bcdg47f7g9048g224f0585a37fText UUID: 28517617-bccf-4225-b34e-baa5df2eab2cGroup ID: 16c15ba6-5390-6c93-76bc-9b3fb59620e8Group Index: 3
                                                                            • See Node 28 (The Emperor) I won't allow it. Again! Dominate it!
                                                        • +

                                                              1.No Speaker: (no line text)note: This spectral harpoon deflects off a psionic barrier created by the Netherbrain and drifts limply in front of the massive visage.

        62.Narrator: *Your blood slows, your senses strung so tight they could snap in an instant.*note: [Morphic Pool: Nervous anticipation] Party looks at each other in nervous anticipation, not sure what's about to happen.
